win_prob: Think of this as a race. KKR is currently far ahead in the final lap, and GT needs a massive burst of speed to catch up!
run_rate: Run rate is just how fast the team is scoring. It's like a car's speedometer; KKR is driving fast enough to reach the target on time.
momentum: Momentum is like a swing. Right now, KKR has pushed the swing so hard that GT is struggling to stop it and push back.
wickets: Wickets are like lives in a video game. GT has lost too many lives, making it harder for them to finish the final level.
clutch: This means a player is performing best when the pressure is highest—like hitting a game-winning shot in the last second!
default: The match is at a critical stage where every ball counts. Imagine a tug-of-war where one team has just gained a massive advantage.
